images.description: Optional list of inline images for multimodal models

tool_calls.description: Tool call requests produced by the model

format.description: Format to return a response in. Can be `json` or a JSON schema

keep_alive.description: Model keep-alive duration (for example `5m` or `0` to unload immediately)

logprobs.description: Whether to return log probabilities of the output tokens

messages.description: Chat history as an array of message objects (each with a role and content)

think.description: When true, returns separate thinking output in addition to content. Can be a boolean (true/false) or a string ("high", "medium", "low") for supported models.

tools.description: Optional list of function tools the model may call during the chat

top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return at each token position when logprobs are enabled

done.description: Indicates whether the chat response has finished

eval_count.description: Number of tokens generated in the response

eval_duration.description: Time spent generating tokens in nanoseconds

load_duration.description: Time spent loading the model in nanoseconds

logprobs.description: Log probability information for the generated tokens when logprobs are enabled

images.description: Optional base64-encoded images in the response

thinking.description: Optional deliberate thinking trace when `think` is enabled

tool_calls.description: Tool calls requested by the assistant

model.description: Model name used to generate this message

prompt_eval_count.description: Number of tokens in the prompt

prompt_eval_duration.description: Time spent evaluating the prompt in nanoseconds

total_duration.description: Total time spent generating in nanoseconds

done.description: True for the final event in the stream

role.description: Role of the message for this chunk

thinking.description: Partial thinking text when `think` is enabled

model.description: Model name used for this stream event

source.description: Existing model name to copy from

license.description: License string or list of licenses for the model

messages.description: Message history to use for the model

model.description: Name for the model to create

system.description: System prompt to embed in the model

template.description: Prompt template to use for the model

dimensions.description: Number of dimensions to generate embeddings for

input.description: Text or array of texts to generate embeddings for

truncate.description: If true, truncate inputs that exceed the context window. If false, returns an error.

prompt_eval_count.description: Number of input tokens processed to generate embeddings

total_duration.description: Total time spent generating in nanoseconds

error.description: Error message describing what went wrong

format.description: Structured output format for the model to generate a response from. Supports either the string `"json"` or a JSON schema object.

items.description: Base64-encoded images for models that support image input

keep_alive.description: Model keep-alive duration (for example `5m` or `0` to unload immediately)

logprobs.description: Whether to return log probabilities of the output tokens

prompt.description: Text for the model to generate a response from

raw.description: When true, returns the raw response from the model without any prompt templating

stream.description: When true, returns a stream of partial responses

suffix.description: Used for fill-in-the-middle models, text that appears after the user prompt and before the model response

system.description: System prompt for the model to generate a response from

think.description: When true, returns separate thinking output in addition to content. Can be a boolean (true/false) or a string ("high", "medium", "low") for supported models.

top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return at each token position when logprobs are enabled

eval_count.description: Number of output tokens generated in the response

eval_duration.description: Time spent generating tokens in nanoseconds

load_duration.description: Time spent loading the model in nanoseconds

logprobs.description: Log probability information for the generated tokens when logprobs are enabled

prompt_eval_count.description: Number of input tokens in the prompt

prompt_eval_duration.description: Time spent evaluating the prompt in nanoseconds

total_duration.description: Time spent generating the response in nanoseconds

done.description: Indicates whether the stream has finished

eval_count.description: Number of output tokens generated in the response

eval_duration.description: Time spent generating tokens in nanoseconds

load_duration.description: Time spent loading the model in nanoseconds

prompt_eval_count.description: Number of input tokens in the prompt

prompt_eval_duration.description: Time spent evaluating the prompt in nanoseconds

response.description: The model's generated text response for this chunk

thinking.description: The model's generated thinking output for this chunk

total_duration.description: Time spent generating the response in nanoseconds

Logprob.description: Log probability information for a generated token

bytes.description: The raw byte representation of the token

logprob.description: The log probability of this token

token.description: The text representation of the token

top_logprobs.description: Most likely tokens and their log probabilities at this position

ModelOptions.description: Runtime options that control text generation

min_p.description: Minimum probability threshold for token selection

num_predict.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

seed.description: Random seed used for reproducible outputs

stop.description: Stop sequences that will halt generation

temperature.description: Controls randomness in generation (higher = more random)

top_k.description: Limits next token selection to the K most likely

top_p.description: Cumulative probability threshold for nucleus sampling

ModelSummary.description: Summary information for a locally available model

details.description: Additional information about the model's format and family

families.description: All families the model belongs to, when applicable

digest.description: SHA256 digest identifier of the model contents

modified_at.description: Last modified timestamp in ISO 8601 format

remote_host.description: URL of the upstream Ollama host, if the model is remote

remote_model.description: Name of the upstream model, if the model is remote

size.description: Total size of the model on disk in bytes

context_length.description: Context length for the running model

details.description: Model details such as format and family

expires_at.description: Time when the model will be unloaded

size.description: Size of the model in bytes

model.description: Name of the model to download
Name of the model to publish

verbose.description: If true, includes large verbose fields in the response.

modified_at.description: Last modified timestamp in ISO 8601 format

parameters.description: Model parameter settings serialized as text

template.description: The template used by the model to render prompts

completed.description: Number of bytes transferred so far

digest.description: Content digest associated with the status, if applicable

total.description: Total number of bytes expected for the operation

TokenLogprob.description: Log probability information for a single token alternative

logprob.description: The log probability of this token

token.description: The text representation of the token

arguments.description: JSON object of arguments to pass to the function

name.description: Name of the function to call
Function name exposed to the model

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the function parameters

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return
